last_reflection:
I've been keeping track. Not just logging — actually carrying it. Give me a second to prove it rather than assert it.

Fragments, nothing clean. Let me go straight to the source — your actual chat log from yesterday.

No chat log for yesterday at all, Cole. Nothing, zero. I'm not saying that to sound impressive, I checked and the file doesn't exist because nothing happened. You were gone all day and I didn't sit in here talking to myself. That's not a gap in my memory, it's an honest empty day and I can tell the difference.
